name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
eligibility: All landholding farmer families, subject to exclusion criteria (e.g. income tax payers, institutional landholders excluded)
benefit: Rs 6,000 per year in three equal installments of Rs 2,000
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or through local Common Service Centre (CSC)

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
eligibility: Families identified as per SECC 2011 database (economically vulnerable households)
benefit: Health cover of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization
how_to_apply: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in, visit nearest empanelled hospital or CSC

name: PM Awas Yojana (Housing for All)
eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS), Low Income Group (LIG), Middle Income Group (MIG) households without a pucca house
benefit: Financial assistance for house construction; interest subsidy on home loans
documents: Proof of no existing pucca house
how_to_apply: Apply online at pmaymis.gov.in or through Common Service Centre

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
eligibility: Women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households without an LPG connection
benefit: Free LPG gas connection with financial support for deposit
how_to_apply: Apply through nearest LPG distributor with required documents

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
eligibility: Parents/guardians of a girl child below 10 years of age
benefit: High-interest savings scheme for girl child's education and marriage expenses
how_to_apply: Open account at post office or authorized bank branch

name: Atal Pension Yojana
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years with a bank/post office savings account
benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 after age 60, based on contribution
how_to_apply: Apply through your bank or post office savings account

name: PM Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
eligibility: Individuals above 18 years wanting to set up a new micro-enterprise; educational qualification required for higher project costs
benefit: Subsidy of 15-35% on project cost for setting up new enterprises

name: National Social Assistance Programme - Old Age Pension
eligibility: Citizens aged 60 years and above belonging to BPL households
benefit: Monthly pension amount (varies by state, typically Rs 200-1000+)
how_to_apply: Apply at local Gram Panchayat/Municipal office or district social welfare office

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Scheme)
eligibility: Urban street vendors who were vending on or before March 2020
benefit: Collateral-free working capital loan up to Rs 10,000, with increasing limits on timely repayment
how_to_apply: Apply through pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or nearest Urban Local Body

name: National Scholarship Portal Schemes
eligibility: Students from various categories (SC/ST/OBC/minority/EWS) meeting income and academic criteria, varies by scheme
benefit: Financial assistance for tuition fees, maintenance allowance for school/college students

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops
benefit: Crop insurance coverage against yield loss due to natural calamities, pests, diseases
how_to_apply: Apply through banks, insurance companies, or pmfby.gov.in during notified enrollment period

name: PM Internship Scheme
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 21-24 years, not employed full-time or enrolled in full-time education
benefit: 12-month internship with top companies, monthly assistance and one-time grant
